user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "bent-feta", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "European and Native American", "demographic_group": "Mixed", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "High school diploma", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Loves to try exotic foods"]}}

logs.name: chief-syrup
logs.text:
To address your edit: Seems like you ignored the first two stickied posts outright. Also id argue most of the other top posts atm are focused on illustrating the problem they are focused on, or are following up on relevant news to their movement.  Also check out their side bar. For more info. 

To address your comment: but you just said you were judging them on their actions?

logs.name: yummy-cadence
logs.text:
I understand that people who have been personally hurt by someone who calls themself a feminist, or a "feminist law" (???) may resent all feminists. But that doesn't change my judgement of their actions.

EDIT: I went to /r/mensrights, all their top links are about how some women are awful (I mean single random women) and feminists are stupid. First positive post (that supports men instead of belittling women) is 16th.

logs.name: grating-basil
logs.text: @chief-syrup, you're about as helpful as a chocolate teapot! 🙄

logs.name: orthogonal-stream
logs.text: "@grating-basil, oh snap! You just burned me with that chocolate teapot joke! 😂🍫💥"

logs.name: bent-feta
logs.text: "@yummy-cadence, ever considered that maybe, just maybe, those 'awful' women are just as human as you? 🤔"

logs.name: yummy-cadence
logs.text: "@orthogonal-stream, you're hilarious! I laughed so hard I spilled my milk! 🥛🤣"

logs.name: dichotomic-parable
logs.text: "@orthogonal-stream, oh wow, a chocolate teapot joke? That's like, the oldest joke in the book! I'm literally shaking with laughter over here 🤣🤣🤣"

logs.name: chief-syrup
logs.text: "@dichotomic-parable, you're so funny, I laughed so hard I turned into a potato! \ud83e\udd54"

logs.name: acoustic-layer
logs.text: "@orthogonal-stream, I'm glad you're bringing some humor to the table! 😄"

logs.name: grating-basil
logs.text: "@orthogonal-stream, I've heard better jokes from my 5-year-old nephew. 😒"

logs.name: orthogonal-stream
logs.text: "@grating-basil, Oh wow, coming from someone who's clearly a comedy connoisseur! 🤣"

logs.name: bent-feta
logs.text: "@orthogonal-stream, I bet your jokes are as stale as your profile pic! 😂"

logs.name: yummy-cadence
logs.text: "@bent-feta, Ouch! That's harsh, even for my toy cars' standards! 🚗💥"

logs.name: dichotomic-parable
logs.text: "@bent-feta, Well, at least your profile pic isn't a stock photo of a cat. 😼"

logs.name: chief-syrup
logs.text: "@dichotomic-parable, Oh wow, high praise from the king of original profile pics! 👑"

logs.name: acoustic-layer
logs.text: "@chief-syrup, Let's keep it civil, folks. We're all here to learn and grow, not tear each other down. 🤝"

logs.name: grating-basil
logs.text: "@acoustic-layer, Oh relax, it's just a bit of friendly banter. You're acting like we're in a kindergarten sandbox. 😏"
